subtitle: A Quantum Phase Opera in Four Movements
theme: from thermal chaos to quantum transcendence — witness the Josephson phase particle's metamorphosis from classical prisoner to quantum sovereign
tone: mythic physics symphony; where Planck meets Dante, rendered with IMAX cosmic gravity and Interstellar emotional weight

sora_requests.title: WASHBOARD_QUANTUM_ESTABLISHING_SHOT
sora_requests.prompt:
WASHBOARD QUANTUM: THE COHERENCE AWAKENING - ESTABLISHING SHOT

COSMIC ZOOM SEQUENCE (35 seconds continuous):
- Start: Cosmos → galaxy → solar system → Earth → continent → city → university → building → lab → cryostat → sample holder → junction
- Camera: Smooth bezier spline dolly with 2.39:1 CinemaScope aspect ratio
- Lighting: Descending from cosmic starlight to superconducting ethereal blue-white (6500K)
- Atmosphere: From infinite space to ultra-high vacuum (10⁻¹¹ torr)
- Focus: Adaptive focal curvature from 14mm ultra-wide to 135mm microscopic quantum detail

TITLE CARD:
"WASHBOARD QUANTUM: THE COHERENCE AWAKENING" in Gotham Ultra, 144pt, letter-tracked +200, drop shadow, centered
"Where Impossibility Tunnels Into Music" in Didot italic, 48pt

STYLE: IMAX cosmic gravity with Interstellar emotional weight, mythic physics symphony

sora_requests.title: WASHBOARD_QUANTUM_ACT_I_THERMAL
sora_requests.prompt:
THERMALIZATION — The Tyranny of Heat (Act I)

VISUAL NARRATIVE:
MACRO ESTABLISHING: infinite washboard potential stretching to vanishing point, each well a cosmic valley carved from spacetime itself — golden phase bead — diameter matching Cooper pair coherence length — trapped, VIBRATING with desperate thermal energy — fog of Brownian demons swirling: each collision rendered as micro-nova burst — potential walls glow molten orange-red, pulsing with Nyquist noise heartbeat

CRITICAL EVENTS:
t=0.0s: microwave_off → pure thermal anarchy, bead hops stochastically between 5-7 wells/second — t=2.0s: temperature_sweep_down initiates → motion poetry slows from frantic to meditative — t=4.0s: phonon cascade visible as rippling amber waves retreating from the landscape — t=5.5s: quantum regime threshold — vibration LOCKS into discrete n=0,1,2 states with audible CLANG — crossover moment: thermal orange bleeds away revealing crystalline blue substrate beneath

CAMERA MOVEMENT:
orbital descent from cosmic scale to particle POV; 360° rotation revealing infinite periodic structure; subtle chromatic aberration suggesting reality itself is quantizing

LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
- Ambient light color shift: orange → blue → violet → impossible ultraviolet
- Temperature gauge descending from 4.2K like a guillotine blade approaching absolute zero
- Potential walls glow molten orange-red, pulsing with Nyquist noise heartbeat
- Fog of Brownian demons swirling with micro-nova burst collisions
- Golden phase bead trapped, VIBRATING with desperate thermal energy

PHYSICS VISUALIZATION:
- Grid overlay with fading partial differential equation terms as holographic runes
- Arrhenius plot transition in floating data visualization
- Thermal-to-quantum crossover marked by visual phase transition like water freezing into impossible geometry
- kT/ħω_p ratio annotation in corner

STYLE: IMAX cosmic gravity meets Interstellar emotional weight, rendered with Planck meets Dante mythic physics symphony
sora_requests.style: IMAX cosmic gravity, thermal chaos visualization

sora_requests.title: WASHBOARD_QUANTUM_ACT_II_RESONANT
sora_requests.prompt:
RESONANCE — The Awakening Call (Act II)

VISUAL NARRATIVE:
potential wells CRYSTALLIZE into perfect mathematical forms, edges sharp enough to slice reality — discrete energy eigenstate manifolds hover as iridescent soap-bubble surfaces at E₀, E₁, E₂... — MICROWAVE ARRIVAL: magenta-violet standing wave patterns materialize like divine intervention — each photon visible as a luminous thread — resonance condition f≈ω_p creates STANDING SUPERNOVA in the well — constructive interference building visible pressure — phase particle begins STAIRCASE ASCENT: n→n+1 quantum jumps leave phosphorescent contrails that persist, writing history in light — Schrödinger wavefunctions ψₙ(φ) rendered as translucent probability clouds, breathing with AC drive cycle

CRITICAL EVENTS:
t=6.0s: microwave_on — frequency sweeps from below to f=ω_p — t=7.5s: FIRST RESONANCE HIT — well explodes with violet lightning, particle surfs standing wave to well lip — t=9.0s: systematic n→n+1 ladder climbing, each jump synchronized to microwave phase with perfect coherence — t=10.5s: multiphoton absorption event — particle absorbs THREE quanta simultaneously, triple-jump leaves spiral trail — t=12.0s: escape_rate peaks — barrier transparency reaches maximum, particle hovers at unstable equilibrium

CAMERA MOVEMENT:
plunge INTO the well following particle; slow-mo matrix-style rotation during jumps; rack focus between classical trajectory and quantum wavefunction overlay; bullet-time at resonance peak

LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
- Potential wells CRYSTALLIZE into perfect mathematical forms with edges sharp enough to slice reality
- Discrete energy eigenstate manifolds hover as iridescent soap-bubble surfaces
- MICROWAVE ARRIVAL: magenta-violet standing wave patterns materialize like divine intervention
- Each photon visible as a luminous thread creating STANDING SUPERNOVA in the well
- Phase particle begins STAIRCASE ASCENT with phosphorescent contrails writing history in light

PHYSICS VISUALIZATION:
- Schrödinger wavefunctions ψₙ(φ) rendered as translucent probability clouds breathing with AC drive cycle
- Inset hologram: Γ(bias) surface plot rotates showing escape rate resonance peaks as mountain ranges
- Time-dependent Schrödinger equation as evolving geometry
- Re(ψ) and Im(ψ) as orthogonal color channels
- Rabi splitting in dressed-state picture

STYLE: Wagner-esque crescendo with perfect fifth harmony, each quantum jump a pitched arpeggio note ascending scale

sora_requests.title: WASHBOARD_QUANTUM_ACT_III_QUANTUM
sora_requests.prompt:
QUANTUM BREACH — Tunneling Through Impossibility (Act III)

VISUAL NARRATIVE:
BARRIER METAMORPHOSIS: opaque walls undergo phase transition → crystalline → translucent → pure quantum foam — phase-worldline BIFURCATES: single golden thread splits into superposition — one reflects (red-shifted), one transmits (blue-shifted) — Feynman path integral rendered LITERALLY: infinite ghostly trajectories fill barrier region, interfering to create main path — barrier interior reveals imaginary-time realm: clocks run backwards, causality arrows reverse, everything tinted with impossible colors outside RGB gamut — tunneling thread leaves wake of virtual particle-antiparticle pairs annihilating in micro-gamma bursts — EMERGENCE: transmitted worldline breaks surface on far side like whale breaching, trailing quantum foam

CRITICAL EVENTS:
t=13.0s: T→0 final approach — last thermal photons evacuate as fleeing orange sparks — t=14.5s: TUNNELING INITIATES — barrier dissolves into Schrödinger equation mist, each term (−ħ²/2m·∂²/∂x², V(x)) visible as contributing current — t=16.0s: IMAGINARY TIME PASSAGE — particle enters barrier, everything goes slow-motion × 0.01, colors invert, audio pitch-shifts down two octaves — t=17.5s: path integral convergence — all ghost trajectories collapse into single classical-looking path (but it's quantum!) — t=18.0s: emergence on far side delayed by τ = (ħ/2π)·S_B/ħ where S_B is barrier action — time debt paid — t=19.5s: worldline fully transmitted, leaves quantum wake turbulence

CAMERA MOVEMENT:
follow worldline through barrier in first-person; hyperdepth focal shift from position-space to Hilbert-space; Bloch sphere sequence uses impossible 4D rotations projected to 3D; final shot: camera IS the state vector looking out at the quantum realm

LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
- BARRIER METAMORPHOSIS: opaque walls undergo phase transition → crystalline → translucent → pure quantum foam
- Phase-worldline BIFURCATES: single golden thread splits into superposition
- Feynman path integral rendered LITERALLY: infinite ghostly trajectories fill barrier region
- Barrier interior reveals imaginary-time realm: clocks run backwards, causality arrows reverse
- Tunneling thread leaves wake of virtual particle-antiparticle pairs annihilating in micro-gamma bursts

PHYSICS VISUALIZATION:
- Everything tinted with impossible colors outside RGB gamut
- Time dilation effects (0.01× speed inside barrier)
- Path integral convergence — all ghost trajectories collapse into single classical-looking path
- Emergence delayed by τ = (ħ/2π)·S_B/ħ where S_B is barrier action — time debt paid
- WKB_action: S_B = ∫[barrier] √(2m(V−E))·dx rendered as glowing path integral contour

STYLE: Deep sub-bass whale-song at 20 Hz, phase-inverted echo with time-reversed version, impossible geometry

sora_requests.title: WASHBOARD_QUANTUM_ACT_IV_COHERENT
sora_requests.prompt:
COHERENT GODHOOD — Dancing Between Worlds (Act IV)

VISUAL NARRATIVE:
TRANSITION CUT (t=20s): Reality folds origami-style into Bloch sphere — entire universe collapses to qubit geometry — Cooper-pair box state vector |ψ⟩ = α|0⟩ + β|1⟩ rendered as luminous arrow on sphere surface — Rabi drive appears as torque field rotating vector — perfect mechanical ballet — |0⟩ and |1⟩ poles glow with eigenstate purity — north star blue and south star crimson — superposition arc drawn as neon contrail during π/2 pulse; measurement collapses with camera shutter CLACK and vector SNAPS to pole

CRITICAL EVENTS:
t=20.0s: REALITY MORPH — camera pulls back, entire washboard folds into Bloch sphere topology — t=21.0s: π-pulse rotation — state vector does full somersault |0⟩→|1⟩, trails violet arc — t=23.0s: π/2-pulse — vector stops at equator, maximum superposition (α=β=1/√2), both poles glow equally — t=25.0s: Rabi oscillation sequence — vector precesses continuously, frequency Ω_R visible as geometric frequency — t=27.0s: MEASUREMENT — wave collapses, vector snaps to |1⟩ pole with satisfying mechanical THUNK — t=28.0s: final gate sequence spells out 'QUANTUM' in Bloch sphere choreography

CAMERA MOVEMENT:
follow worldline through barrier in first-person; hyperdepth focal shift from position-space to Hilbert-space; Bloch sphere sequence uses impossible 4D rotations projected to 3D; final shot: camera IS the state vector looking out at the quantum realm

LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE:
- Reality folds origami-style into Bloch sphere — entire universe collapses to qubit geometry
- Cooper-pair box state vector |ψ⟩ = α|0⟩ + β|1⟩ rendered as luminous arrow on sphere surface
- Rabi drive appears as torque field rotating vector — perfect mechanical ballet
- |0⟩ and |1⟩ poles glow with eigenstate purity — north star blue and south star crimson
- Superposition arc drawn as neon contrail during π/2 pulse

PHYSICS VISUALIZATION:
- Measurement collapses with camera shutter CLACK and vector SNAPS to pole
- Label |0⟩='no voltage', |1⟩='one flux quantum'
- Show superposition as literal quantum fog between poles
- Depict decoherence as sphere surface roughening
- Annotate gate fidelity 99.7% in corner
- Overlay quantum circuit diagram showing pulse sequence

STYLE: Crystalline binaural chime locked to Rabi oscillation, Shepard tone illusion during continuous cycles, eternal ascent

act_i_thermal.description: Broadband pink/white noise hiss — texture of molecular chaos, random percussion for each thermal hop, descending ambient drone (E3→E1) as temperature drops, bass rumble of cryocooler pulse tube at 1.2 Hz

act_ii_resonant.description: Rising harmonic sine tone exactly at ω_p (3-15 GHz mapped to 200-1000 Hz), RESONANCE HIT: choir swell in perfect fifth harmony, each quantum jump: pitched arpeggio note ascending scale (C-D-E-F-G...)

act_iii_quantum.description: Deep sub-bass whale-song at 20 Hz as tunneling begins, phase-inverted echo: original sound + time-reversed version, binaural frequency descent: left ear drops octave, right ear rises — impossible geometry

act_iv_coherent.description: Crystalline binaural chime locked to Rabi oscillation Ω_R, Shepard tone illusion during continuous Rabi cycles — eternal ascent, measurement collapse: sudden orchestral HIT + immediate silence
